creator: johan@stromnet.se
text:
Just tried curl package from FreeBSD mirror, and that works for both HTTP and HTTPS.. So it's something which is conflicting with my local build. That said, the exact same options have been working before.


FreeBSD mirror ldd:

root@103amd64-default:~ # ldd /usr/local/bin/curl
/usr/local/bin/curl:
        libcurl.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/libcurl.so.4 (0x80084e000)
        libz.so.6 => /lib/libz.so.6 (0x800ac7000)
        libkrb5.so.11 => /usr/lib/libkrb5.so.11 (0x800cdd000)
        libgssapi.so.10 => /usr/lib/libgssapi.so.10 (0x800f55000)
        libgssapi_krb5.so.10 => /usr/lib/libgssapi_krb5.so.10 (0x80115e000)
        libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x80137c000)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x8015a1000)
        libnghttp2.so.14 => /usr/local/lib/libnghttp2.so.14 (0x80194e000)
        libssl.so.7 => /usr/lib/libssl.so.7 (0x801b74000)
        libheimntlm.so.11 => /usr/lib/libheimntlm.so.11 (0x801de0000)
        libhx509.so.11 => /usr/lib/libhx509.so.11 (0x801fe6000)
        libcom_err.so.5 => /usr/lib/libcom_err.so.5 (0x802230000)
        libcrypto.so.7 => /lib/libcrypto.so.7 (0x802432000)
        libasn1.so.11 => /usr/lib/libasn1.so.11 (0x802827000)
        libwind.so.11 => /usr/lib/libwind.so.11 (0x802ac4000)
        libheimbase.so.11 => /usr/lib/libheimbase.so.11 (0x802cec000)
        libroken.so.11 => /usr/lib/libroken.so.11 (0x802ef0000)
        libcrypt.so.5 => /lib/libcrypt.so.5 (0x803102000)
        libheimipcc.so.11 => /usr/lib/private/libheimipcc.so.11 (0x803322000)
root@103amd64-default:~ # ldd /usr/local/lib/libcurl.so
/usr/local/lib/libcurl.so:
        libnghttp2.so.14 => /usr/local/lib/libnghttp2.so.14 (0x801679000)
        libssl.so.7 => /usr/lib/libssl.so.7 (0x80189f000)
